Handles accessory modes, analytics, Bluetooth management, app sessions, and implements an idle watchdog.

## Folders
- **[accessory](accessory/README.md)**: Handles accessory modes, imaging, and manufacturing operations with state management and input handling.
- **[analytics](analytics/README.md)**: Stub functions for initializing, handling, and logging analytics metrics and events, including crashes and Bluetooth disconnections.
- **[bluetooth](bluetooth/README.md)**: Stub functions for BLE HRM support and lifecycle management, and management of Bluetooth persistent storage.
- **[comm_session](comm_session/README.md)**: Functions to initialize and evict app session capabilities using UUIDs.

## Files
- **[idle_watchdog.c](idle_watchdog.c.md)**: Implements an idle watchdog to manage device standby based on connection and battery events.
- **[idle_watchdog.h](idle_watchdog.h.md)**: Functions to start and stop a watchdog for monitoring battery, Bluetooth, and button events.
